_doc: Cohort definitions for dailySupersearchRefill. Schema CRACKED 2026-05-02 via systematic API probes. Live verified against count-leads-from-supersearch.
_status: ACTIVE — schema verified, cron will pull real leads on next 07:00 UTC tick

verified_filter_shape._note: POST /api/v2/supersearch-enrichment/count-leads-from-supersearch with { search_filters: {...} }. ALL field names verified live.
verified_filter_shape.industry: {include: ['<exact_industry_label>'], exclude: []} — include MUST be array (not object), values from Instantly enum
verified_filter_shape.title: {include: ['<title>', ...]} — include MUST be array (not object)
verified_filter_shape.employeeCount: [{op: 'between', min: N, max: N}] — camelCase (NOT employee_count), array of operator objects
verified_filter_shape.skip_in_workspace: boolean, true = exclude leads already in workspace
verified_filter_shape.one_lead_per_company: boolean, true = dedupe to one lead per company

_verified_2026_05_02.city_level_MX_limitations: Cancún, Playa del Carmen, Mexico City place_ids return 1M (filter ignored) — Instantly's index does not have city-level tagging for Mexican cities. Use country=Mexico place_id ChIJU1NoiDs6BIQREZgJa760ZO0 instead.

mx_decision_makers.label: MX Real Estate Decision-Makers (Owner/Founder/CEO/President/Director/Broker — 5-500 employees)
mx_decision_makers.personalization_template: Estaba revisando inmobiliarias mexicanas con base digital sólida en mi pipeline de mayo, y {{companyName}} salió en mi radar — quería preguntarte algo concreto.

usa_decision_makers.label: USA Real Estate Decision-Makers (Owner/Founder/CEO/President/Director/Broker) — covers California/Texas/Florida/NY/ALL states
usa_decision_makers._bumped_2026_05_02: Bumped from 30→100/day per Alex directive — grow USA retargeting CA faster. New leads auto-flow to FB CA via syncInstantlyToFbCustomAudiences cron 9am CDMX. Google Ads CM upload blocked on Data Manager API allowlist (separate apply).
usa_decision_makers.personalization_template: Was reviewing US real estate firms with solid digital fundamentals for my May pipeline, and {{companyName}} caught my eye — wanted to ask you something specific.

miami_brokers.label: Miami Real Estate Decision-Makers (5-500 employees)
miami_brokers.personalization_template: Was reviewing Miami real estate firms with solid digital fundamentals for my May pipeline, and {{companyName}} caught my eye — wanted to ask you something specific about bilingual buyer flow.
